meta.name: Enrich chatbot and demo request leads with Lusha, HubSpot, and Slack

name: Chat & Demo Request Enrichment with Lusha

parameters.content:
## Enrich Chatbot and Demo Request Leads with Lusha

**Who it's for:** SDRs handling inbound chatbot & demo request leads

**What it does:** Enriches leads from chatbots or demo request flows with Lusha, scores them by ICP fit, creates/updates the HubSpot contact, and sends priority-based Slack alerts. High-priority demo requests get an urgent SDR alert.

### How it works
1. Webhook receives a chatbot message or demo request with an email
2. Email is validated and the contact is enriched with Lusha
3. A lead priority score is calculated based on seniority and company size
4. HubSpot contact is created/updated with enriched data
5. High-priority leads get an urgent Slack alert; others get a standard notification

### Setup
1. Install the [Lusha community node](https://www.npmjs.com/package/@lusha-org/n8n-nodes-lusha)
2. Add your Lusha API, HubSpot OAuth2, and Slack credentials
3. Point your chatbot or demo form webhook to the n8n endpoint
4. Customize the priority scoring logic and Slack channels

Webhook receives the chatbot/demo form POST. A code node validates the email and extracts form fields.

**Nodes:** Webhook → Validate & Clean Input

💡 Customize the expected payload fields to match your chatbot.

Lusha enriches the contact by email. A code node builds a lead summary and calculates a priority score based on seniority, company size, and request type.

**Nodes:** Lusha Enrich → Build Summary & Score → Is High Priority? (IF)

📖 [Lusha API docs](https://www.lusha.com/docs/)

HubSpot contact is created/updated with all enriched fields. High-priority leads trigger an urgent Slack alert; standard leads get a normal notification.

**Nodes:** Upsert HubSpot → Priority Routing → Urgent Alert / Standard Alert

💡 Customize the Slack channels and priority thresholds.
